about.supportDesc: Need help or want to report a bug? We are here to assist.
about.tagline: More than FTP. A complete developer toolkit.

activity.insecure_cert_enabled: {protocol} connection to {server} with certificate verification disabled

ai.apiKeyNotConfigured: API key not configured for {provider}. Open AI Settings to add one.
ai.disclaimer: AI may make mistakes. Double-check code.
ai.dropFileToAnalyze: Drop file to analyze with AeroAgent

error.authFailed: Authentication failed. Check your API key in AI Settings.
error.modelNotFound: Model not found. Check your model name in AI Settings.
error.networkError: Network error. Check your internet connection and provider URL.
error.noProvider: Make sure you have configured an AI provider in settings.
error.rateLimited: Rate limited by the provider. Wait a moment and try again.
error.toolsNotSupported: This model does not support tool use. Disable "Tools" for this model in AI Settings → Models.

ai.errorAuth: Authentication failed. Check your API key in AI Settings.
ai.errorDefault: Make sure you have configured an AI provider in settings.
ai.errorModelNotFound: Model not found. Check your model name in AI Settings.
ai.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your internet connection and provider URL.
ai.errorRateLimit: Rate limited by the provider. Wait a moment and try again.
ai.errorServerError: The AI provider server is experiencing issues. Try again in a moment.
ai.errorServiceUnavailable: The AI provider is temporarily unavailable (overloaded). Free tier services may have limits. Try again later.
ai.errorTimeout: Gateway timeout. The provider took too long to respond.
ai.errorToolUse: This model does not support tool use. Disable "Tools" for this model in AI Settings → Models, or switch to a model that supports function calling.
ai.executeApproval: I want to execute **{tool}**. Approve or cancel:

geminiCache.description: Large system prompts and contexts (32K+ tokens) are automatically cached for 5 minutes, reducing latency and cost by up to 75% on subsequent requests.
geminiCache.title: Context Caching

history.retentionDesc: Automatically delete conversations older than the selected period. Powered by SQLite + FTS5.
history.retentionHint: Set to Unlimited to keep all conversations forever. Cleanup runs automatically on startup.

marketplace.subtitle: Discover and add AI providers from our marketplace
marketplace.title: AI Provider Marketplace

ai.noModelSelected: No model selected. Click ⚙️ to configure a provider.
ai.noProvidersConfigured: No AI providers configured. Click ⚙️ to add one.
ai.rateLimitReached: Rate limit reached for {provider}. Try again in {seconds}s.

settings.addProviderFirst: Add a provider first to manage models
settings.addProviderHint: Add a provider above to get started
settings.advancedDescription: Configure advanced AI parameters for response generation.
settings.autoRoutingDescription: Automatically select the best model for each task type
settings.autoRoutingInstruction: Configure which model to use for each task type. When auto-routing is enabled, the AI will automatically select the appropriate model based on the task.
settings.autoRoutingTip: Tip: Leave as "Auto (Default)" to use the model selected in the chat header. Configure specific models only when you want different models for different tasks.
settings.contextCachingDesc: Large system prompts and contexts (32K+ tokens) are automatically cached for 5 minutes, reducing latency and cost by up to 75% on subsequent requests.
settings.macrosCustomNote: Custom macro creation will be available in a future update. Currently showing built-in macros.
settings.macrosDescription: Macros are reusable multi-step tool sequences. They appear as tools in AeroAgent's available actions.
settings.maxResponseHelp: Higher values allow longer responses but use more API credits.
settings.noModelsFound: No models found. Is Ollama running?
settings.overrideSystemPrompt: Override the default AeroAgent system prompt
settings.pluginCreateHint: Create a folder with a plugin.json manifest in the plugins directory
settings.pluginsDesc: Extend AeroAgent with custom tools. Place plugin folders in the app plugins directory.
settings.promptDesc: Customize the system prompt that defines AeroAgent's behavior and personality.
settings.styleHelp: Precise = factual responses. Creative = more imaginative. Balanced = default.
settings.thinkingBudgetDesc: Token budget for extended thinking (Claude, o3, Gemini). Higher values allow deeper reasoning.
settings.title: AI Settings

ai.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser.

streamingTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for a streaming response before timing out.
streamingTimeout.hint: Increase this value when using extended thinking budgets (50K+ tokens). Range: 30-600 seconds.
streamingTimeout.title: Streaming Timeout

agentMode.title: Agent Mode
agentMode.description: Controls tool approval behavior, step limits, and autonomy level.
agentMode.safeDesc: Only safe tools auto-execute. No session memory. Max 5 steps.
agentMode.normalDesc: Safe tools auto-execute. Session-approve medium tools. Max 10 steps.
agentMode.expertDesc: Safe and medium auto-execute. Session-approve high-risk. Max 25 steps.
agentMode.extremeDesc: All tools auto-execute. No confirmations. Max 50 steps. Cyber only.

extremeMode.title: Extreme Mode
extremeMode.description: Auto-approve ALL tool calls without confirmation dialogs. Increases multi-step limit from 10 to 50. Available in Cyber theme only.
extremeMode.warning: All file operations will execute immediately without approval. Use at your own risk.

templates.analyzeUi: Analyze UI screenshot for layout, accessibility, and UX issues
templates.performance: Analyze code for performance bottlenecks and optimization

webSearch.description: Allow the AI to search the web for current information. Supported by Kimi (Moonshot) and Qwen (Alibaba).
webSearch.providerNote: Only active when using Kimi or Qwen providers. Other providers ignore this setting.
webSearch.title: Web Search

ai.welcome: Your AI-powered FTP assistant. I can help you manage files, analyze code, and execute operations.
ai.welcomeSubtitle: 44 tools for file management, code editing, and system operations
ai.welcomeSubtitleSetup: Configure an AI provider to get started
ai.welcomePromptLocal1: Show me the 10 largest files in the current folder
ai.welcomePromptLocal2: Find duplicate files and suggest cleanup
ai.welcomePromptLocal3: Run ls -la and summarize what you see
ai.welcomePromptRemote1: List all files on the remote server

cloud.cloudNameDesc: Custom name displayed in the tab
cloud.publicUrlDesc: Set this to enable "Share Link" for files. Your web server must serve files from the same path as your FTP remote folder.
cloud.syncIntervalDesc: How often to sync files in the background
cloud.excludePatternsDesc: One pattern per line. Supports glob syntax.

connection.aerocloudConfigured: AeroCloud is already configured and syncing
connection.aerocloudDesc: Turn any server into your personal cloud with automatic sync
connection.aerocloudHelp: You can also configure AeroCloud from the status bar
connection.filenEncryptionDesc: All files are encrypted client-side with AES-256-GCM before upload. Filen cannot access your data. Your password never leaves this device.
connection.internxtEncryptionDesc: All files are encrypted end-to-end with AES-256-CTR. Internxt cannot access your data. EU-based, GDPR compliant.
connection.kdriveTokenHelp: Generate a token at manager.infomaniak.com → Developer → API Tokens
connection.jottacloudTokenPlaceholder: Paste your Jottacloud login token here
connection.jottacloudTokenHelp: Generate at jottacloud.com → Settings → Security. Token is single-use and expires quickly — paste it immediately after copying
connection.koofrAppPasswordPlaceholder: Paste your Koofr app password here
connection.koofrHelp: Generate an app password at app.koofr.net → Preferences → Password → App Passwords
connection.yandexdiskTokenPlaceholder: Paste your Yandex OAuth token here
connection.yandexdiskHelp: Create an app at oauth.yandex.com → Authorize → Copy the OAuth token (valid for 1 year)
connection.drimeTokenPlaceholder: Paste your Drime API token here
connection.drimeTokenHelp: Generate a token at app.drime.cloud → Account Settings → Developers

fourshared.createAppInstructions: Create a developer app at 4shared.com/developer and enter the Consumer Key and Secret below.

connection.logoutOnDisconnectDesc: Terminate MEGAcmd session when closing connection
connection.megaModeNativeDesc: Direct integration in AeroFTP. Recommended for the best experience.
connection.megaModeCmdDesc: Uses the MEGAcmd tool as a bridge. Requires MEGAcmd installed separately.
connection.megaNativeNoticeDesc: Native API connects directly to MEGA without external dependencies. No additional software required.
connection.megaRequirementDesc: This feature requires the free MEGAcmd tool installed and running on your system.

oauth.createAppInstructions: You need to create an OAuth2 app with {provider} and enter the credentials below.
oauth.redirectUriHelp: Copy this URL and paste it as the Redirect URI in your developer app settings.
oauth.redirectUriNoteGoogle: Google accepts any loopback port. Copy this as the Authorized Redirect URI in your Google Cloud Console.
oauth.zohoRegionHelp: Select the region matching your Zoho account (e.g. zoho.eu for Europe).

connection.securityEncryption: Optional master password with Argon2id key derivation
connection.securityKeyring: AES-256-GCM encrypted vault — stored locally on your device
connection.securityNoSend: No cloud sync, no telemetry — your data stays on your machine
connection.securityTLS: TLS 1.3 / SSH encryption for all connections

connection.sessionKeysStored: Session keys stored securely in system keyring

properties.checksumFolderNA: Checksums are not available for folders

protocol.advancedWarning: These fields are pre-configured for this provider. Changing them may prevent the connection from working correctly.
protocol.aerocloudTooltip: Turn any server into your personal cloud with automatic sync
protocol.azureAuthHelp: Use Account Name as username and Access Key as password. Alternatively, leave password empty and provide a SAS token in the endpoint field.
protocol.azureTooltip: Azure Blob Storage - Shared Key or SAS token authentication
protocol.sourceforgeTooltip: Upload releases to SourceForge via SFTP
protocol.blompTooltip: Blomp — 40GB free cloud storage powered by OpenStack Swift
protocol.encryptionExplicitIfAvailable: Use explicit FTP over TLS if available
protocol.felicloudTooltip: Felicloud — Nextcloud-based EU cloud storage with 10GB free, GDPR compliant
protocol.seafileTooltip: Seafile - Self-hosted open-source cloud with WebDAV support
protocol.kdriveTooltip: kDrive by Infomaniak - Swiss-hosted cloud storage with 15GB free
protocol.jottacloudTooltip: Jottacloud - GDPR-compliant Norwegian cloud storage with 5GB free
protocol.drimeTooltip: Drime Cloud - 20GB free secure cloud storage with REST API
protocol.fileluTooltip: FileLu - 1GB free storage with FTP, FTPS, WebDAV, S3 and native API
protocol.koofrTooltip: Koofr - Slovenian privacy-focused cloud with 10GB free, also accessible via WebDAV
protocol.opendriveTooltip: OpenDrive - 5GB free cloud storage, username/password authentication
protocol.opendriveAuthHelp: OpenDrive uses direct username/password login on dev.opendrive.com. No app key is required.
protocol.yandexdiskTooltip: Yandex Disk - Russian cloud storage with 5GB free, OAuth2 token authentication
protocol.githubTooltip: Browse GitHub repos as filesystem. Uploads create Git commits. Release assets up to 2 GiB.
protocol.githubAuthHelp: Use a Fine-grained Personal Access Token from github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens. Required permissions: Contents (Read & Write), Metadata (Read).
protocol.gitlabTooltip: Browse GitLab repos as filesystem. Uploads create Git commits. Supports self-hosted instances.
protocol.ftpTooltip: FTP with configurable TLS encryption. Supports Explicit, Implicit (FTPS), and opportunistic modes.
protocol.ftpWarningDesc: FTP transmits credentials and data in plain text. Consider using FTPS or SFTP for a secure connection.
protocol.googledriveTooltip: Google Drive - 15GB free storage, OAuth2 authentication
protocol.keyPassphraseHelp: Leave empty if key is not encrypted
protocol.onedriveTooltip: Microsoft OneDrive - 5GB free storage, OAuth2 authentication
protocol.pcloudRegionHelp: Select the region matching your pCloud account registration.
protocol.zohoworkdriveTooltip: Zoho WorkDrive - Team file management, OAuth2, 8 regions
protocol.megaS4Tooltip: MEGA S4 Object Storage - S3-compatible, 4 regions (EU/CA), presigned URLs, IAM policies
protocol.s3Desc: AWS S3, MEGA S4, R2, B2
protocol.s3Tooltip: S3-compatible storage - AWS S3, MEGA S4, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2
protocol.sftpTooltip: SFTP over SSH - secure shell file transfer, supports key authentication
protocol.swiftTooltip: OpenStack Swift — compatible with Blomp, OVH, Rackspace cloud storage
protocol.sshAuthHelp: Leave empty to use password authentication. For key-based auth, provide your private key path.
protocol.independentProject: AeroFTP is an independent project. {provider} integration is maintained through official documentation.
protocol.independentProjectContact: AeroFTP is an independent project in direct contact with {provider} to ensure reliable integration and direct support.
protocol.directContact: In direct contact with {provider} for priority support and updates.
protocol.webdavNote: WebDAV path should include the full path to your files. For Nextcloud use:
protocol.webdavTooltip: WebDAV protocol - compatible with Nextcloud, CloudMe, Koofr, Synology NAS
protocol.insecureCertConfirmFirst: Accepting invalid or self-signed certificates weakens connection security. Only enable this if you trust the server and understand the risks.
protocol.hostKeyNewBody: The server presented a host key that is not yet in your known hosts file. This is normal for a first connection. Verify the fingerprint with your server administrator before accepting.
protocol.hostKeyChangedBody: The host key for this server has changed since the last connection. This could indicate a man-in-the-middle attack, or the server may have been reconfigured.
protocol.hostKeyChangedWarning: If you did not expect this change, do NOT accept the new key and contact the server administrator immediately.
protocol.s3InfoLine1: Requires Access Key ID and Secret Key. Region and endpoint vary by provider.
protocol.s3InfoLine2: Ideal for cloud object storage, backups, and large-scale file hosting.
protocol.webdavInfoLine1: Requires server URL, username, and password. Port 443 (HTTPS) by default.
protocol.webdavInfoLine2: Ideal for self-hosted clouds, NAS devices, and file sharing.
protocol.protocolsInfoLine1: Connect using standard file transfer protocols. Supports FTP, FTPS (encrypted), SFTP (SSH-based), and Azure Blob Storage.
protocol.protocolsInfoLine2: Enter your server address, port, and credentials to get started.
protocol.cloudInfoLine1: Sign in with your cloud account. Some services use OAuth (one-click login), others require an API key or app password from your account settings.
protocol.cloudInfoLine2: Free storage varies by provider - check each service for details.
protocol.developerInfoLine1: Integrations for development workflows. Browse repositories, manage releases, and upload files directly to hosting platforms.
protocol.developerInfoLine2: Requires a personal access token (PAT) or SSH key for authentication.

savedServers.foursharedConfigError: Please configure 4shared credentials in Settings > Cloud Providers.
savedServers.oauthConfigError: Please configure {provider} credentials in Settings > Cloud Providers.
savedServers.clickToRenew: Click to renew session and connect

totp.disableConfirm: Enter your current TOTP code to disable two-factor authentication:
totp.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify:
totp.scanQr: Add this secret to your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator). Or enter the manual key:

settings.aerocloudInfo: Turn any server into your personal cloud. Supports all 21 protocols. Configure sync folders, intervals, and conflict resolution.
settings.analyticsDesc: Help improve AeroFTP by sharing: app version, language, and OS. No personal data or server information is ever collected.
settings.appBackgroundPatternDesc: Choose a subtle pattern for the main app background
settings.autoLockDesc: Lock the app automatically after this period of inactivity (0 = disabled)
settings.autoThemeDesc: Automatically switch between Light and Dark based on your system preference
settings.cloudProviderDesc: Configure cloud storage providers. AeroCloud uses your FTP server, OAuth2 providers need API credentials.
settings.swapPanelsDesc: Place the local panel on the left and the remote panel on the right
settings.confirmRemovePassword: Are you sure you want to remove master password protection? Your credentials will still be stored securely, but the app will no longer require a password to open.
settings.connectionTimeoutDesc: Time before connection attempt times out
settings.doubleClickDesc: What happens when you double-click a file
settings.exportKeystoreDesc: Export all encrypted credentials to a backup file
settings.ftpModeDesc: Passive mode works better behind NAT/firewalls
settings.importKeystoreDesc: Import credentials from a backup file
settings.includeCredentialsHint: Passwords and API keys will be encrypted in the file
settings.iconThemeDesc: Choose an icon style for files and folders
settings.iconThemeFilledDesc: Colored document shapes with type badges
settings.iconThemeMinimalDesc: Monochrome icons that adapt to the current theme
settings.iconThemeOutlineDesc: Clean stroke icons with color-coded file types
settings.launchOnStartupDesc: Automatically start AeroFTP when your computer boots. Recommended if you use AeroCloud Sync.
settings.linuxBadgeDesc: Show sync status badges on files in Nautilus, Nemo, and other file managers.
settings.masterPasswordDesc: Protect AeroFTP with a master password. The app will lock after inactivity and require your password to unlock.
settings.migrationDesc: AeroFTP found unencrypted data that should be moved to the encrypted vault for maximum security.
settings.noSavedServersDesc: Add servers from the connection screen
settings.oauthConnectionDesc: Authentication is managed via browser. Configure credentials in Settings → Cloud Providers.
settings.oauthNote: OAuth2 credentials are stored locally in your encrypted vault and never sent to AeroFTP servers.
settings.githubOauthDesc: Device Flow OAuth — no Client ID needed
settings.githubOauthInfo: GitHub uses Device Flow OAuth with the built-in AeroFTP App. No client credentials are required. You can also use a Personal Access Token or a GitHub App .pem key from the connection screen.
settings.overwriteIfDifferent: Overwrite if date or size differs
settings.passwordRequirements: Minimum 8 characters. Use a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols for best security.
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.preserveTimestampsDesc: Keep original modification dates when transferring
settings.privacyDesc: Control your data and privacy settings
settings.privacyRespect: AeroFTP respects your privacy. We collect minimal data to improve the application.
settings.publicUrlBaseDesc: Enable "Copy Share Link" for files on this server. Enter the HTTP URL that maps to your FTP root folder.
settings.rememberLastFolderDesc: Open the last visited local folder on startup
settings.restartRequired: Restart may be required for full effect
settings.securityArgon2: Argon2id key derivation (128 MiB memory, 4 iterations)
settings.securityLocal: Passwords are stored locally on your device
settings.securityNoSend: No credentials are ever sent to external servers
settings.securityOAuth: OAuth tokens use secure file storage
settings.securityTLS: All connections use encryption when available
settings.iconAutoDetectHint: If no icon is set, the favicon or icon.png from the server is detected automatically.
settings.showStatusBarDesc: Display connection info and statistics at the bottom
settings.showSystemMenuBarDesc: Show the native File/Edit/View menu at the top of the window
settings.sortFoldersFirstDesc: Show directories before files in the file list
settings.themeCyberDesc: Neon green matrix aesthetic with emerald accents
settings.themeDarkDesc: Easy on the eyes with a dark gray palette
settings.themeDesc: Choose a visual theme for the application
settings.themeLightDesc: Clean and bright for well-lit environments
settings.themeTokyoDesc: Inspired by Tokyo nightlife with purple hues
settings.title: Settings
settings.toastNotificationsDesc: Display popup notifications for actions (errors always shown). Activity Log is always available.
settings.transferModeDesc: Auto mode detects file type and chooses appropriately
settings.upToDateAlert:
Up to date!

Running AeroFTP v{version}
settings.visibleColumnsDesc: Choose which columns to display in the file list view
settings.windowsBadgeDesc: Sync badges are managed automatically via Windows Cloud Filter API. Explorer shows native sync status icons when AeroCloud is active.

shortcuts.helpText: Press [F1] anytime to show this dialog
shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts

statusBar.insecureConnectionUnencrypted: This connection is not encrypted. Credentials are sent in plain text.

support.subtitle: Your support helps keep AeroFTP free!
support.title: Support AeroFTP

syncPanel.clickCompare: Click "Compare Now" to scan for differences
syncPanel.descBidirectional: Checks differences in both directions: downloads newer remote files and uploads newer local files.
syncPanel.descLocalToRemote: Checks which local files are newer and uploads them to the remote server.
syncPanel.descRemoteToLocal: Checks which remote files are newer and downloads them to the local folder.
syncPanel.indexAvailableTooltip: A sync index from a previous sync is available — conflict detection is enhanced
syncPanel.title: AeroSync
syncPanel.profileMirrorDesc: Local → Remote, delete orphans, verify size
syncPanel.profileBackupDesc: Local → Remote, checksum verify, no deletes
syncPanel.profilePullDesc: Remote → Local, delete orphans, verify size
syncPanel.profileRemoteBackupDesc: Remote → Local, checksum verify, no deletes
syncPanel.parallelTurboDesc: Multiple concurrent FTP connections for faster sync
syncPanel.watcherInotifyWarning: High directory count — may exceed inotify limit
syncPanel.speedNormalTooltip: Sequential transfer, 1 stream — safe and reliable
syncPanel.speedFastTooltip: 3 parallel streams, auto compression — good balance
syncPanel.speedTurboTooltip: 6 parallel streams, compression on, delta sync — maximum speed
syncPanel.speedExtremeTooltip: 8 parallel streams, compression on, delta sync — maximum parallel power
syncPanel.speedManiacTooltip: 8 streams + ALL safety disabled — no journal, no verify, no retry
syncPanel.maniacWarningBody: No journal. No verification. No retry. Maximum raw speed. If something fails, it's gone. A full verification scan will run after sync completes.
syncPanel.templateExportDesc: Save current sync configuration as a reusable .aerosync template
syncPanel.templateImportDesc: Load a .aerosync template to apply its sync configuration
syncPanel.journalHistoryDesc: Past sync sessions with integrity verification
syncPanel.journalVerifyFailed: Journal integrity check failed — data may have been tampered with
syncPanel.canaryDesc: Run a trial sync on a subset of files before committing to the full operation.
syncPanel.canaryProjection: Based on {percent}% sample, full sync would transfer ~{files} files ({size})

cyberTools.title: Security Tools
cyberTools.hashDescription: Calculate cryptographic hashes for text or files
cyberTools.hashNoInput: Enter text or select a file
cyberTools.cryptoDescription: Encrypt and decrypt text with military-grade algorithms
cyberTools.cryptoKdfInfo: Key derivation: Argon2id (64 MB / t=3 / p=4)
cyberTools.cryptoDecryptFailed: Decryption failed — wrong password or corrupted data
cyberTools.pwdNotBip39: Not a valid BIP-39 mnemonic — do not use as a cryptocurrency wallet seed
cyberTools.pwdNoCharset: Select at least one character set

vault.description: AeroVault lets you create AES-256 encrypted containers to securely store your files.
vault.descriptionV2: AeroVault v2 provides military-grade encryption with nonce misuse-resistant AES-256-GCM-SIV and optional cascade encryption.
vault.dropFiles: Drop files to add to vault
vault.empty: Vault is empty. Add files to get started.
vault.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
vault.title: AeroVault

remote.noConnection: Connect to a server to open remote vaults
remote.title: Remote Vault

vault.emptyVaultHint: Drag files here or click Add Files to get started

vaultSync.title: Vault Sync
vaultSync.description: Synchronize an AeroVault with a local directory. Files can be copied in either direction.

github.appTokenDuration: Installation tokens are valid for 1 hour and auto-refresh on connect.
github.appMissingIds: Please enter App ID and Installation ID first.
github.appTokenReadyShort: Installation token ready (expires in about 1 hour)
github.appTokenExpired: Token expired — will auto-refresh on connect using .pem
github.appTokenExpiringSoon: Token expiring soon — will auto-refresh on connect
github.pemNotFound: PEM file not found. It may have been moved or deleted. Please re-import the .pem file.
github.pemInvalidFormat: Invalid PEM key format. Download a fresh private key from GitHub App settings and re-import.
github.pemEmpty: PEM file is empty. Please download a new private key from your GitHub App settings.
github.pemStoredInVault: Your PEM key is now encrypted (AES-256) and stored securely in the vault. For your safety, delete or secure the original .pem file — AeroFTP no longer needs it.
github.pemVaultReady: PEM key found in vault — ready to connect
github.deviceFlowHint: The browser should already be open. Enter this code on GitHub, then confirm here.
github.writeModeDirectTooltip: Changes are committed directly to the branch
github.writeModeReadOnlyTooltip: No write access to this repository
github.readonlyWarning: This branch is read-only. You cannot commit changes.
github.protectedBranch: Branch is protected. Changes will be committed to a new branch.
github.branchProtectionInfo: Uploads, renames, and deletes create Git commits. If the branch is protected, a working branch will be created automatically and you can open a Pull Request to merge your changes.
github.pagesNotEnabled: GitHub Pages is not enabled for this repository.
github.pagesEnableHint: Enable it from repository Settings > Pages on GitHub.
github.pagesWorkflowHint: Deployments are managed by GitHub Actions. Push a commit to trigger a new build.
github.oauthHint: Use "Authorize with GitHub" on the connection screen to authenticate via Device Flow. The token is stored securely in the vault.
github.notAuthorized: Not yet authorized. Connect first to authorize.
github.appHint: PEM key is imported and stored in the vault from the connection screen.
github.importChangelogTooltip: Read CHANGELOG.md from repository and extract the section matching the tag version
github.unpushedCommitsDesc: Your local git repository has commits not yet pushed to GitHub. Uploading via AeroFTP creates commits on the remote HEAD, which may skip your local changes and cause merge conflicts.
github.unpushedCommitsHint: Recommended: push local commits first to keep history linear.
github.confirmDeleteRelease: Delete this release? This cannot be undone.
github.confirmDeleteAsset: Delete this asset? This cannot be undone.

gitlab.projectPathHint: Use owner/repo for gitlab.com, or self-hosted.com/owner/repo for self-hosted instances
gitlab.tokenHint: Personal or Project Access Token with api scope.
gitlab.importChangelogTooltip: Read CHANGELOG.md and extract section matching tag
gitlab.confirmDeleteRelease: Delete this release? The git tag will be preserved.
gitlab.confirmDeleteAsset: Remove this link from the release? The uploaded package file will remain in the registry.

shareLinkModal.title: Share Link
shareLinkModal.passwordRequired: This server requires a password for share links. A secure password was generated automatically.
shareLinkModal.passwordHint: Some providers require a paid plan for password-protected links

filelu.cloneSuccess: File cloned — URL copied to clipboard
filelu.enterFolderPassword: Enter folder password (leave blank to remove):
filelu.filedropDesc: Others can upload files to this folder without an account
filelu.folderPublicDesc: Anyone can browse the contents of this folder
filelu.remoteUrlUploadDesc: Paste a direct link — FileLu will download the file server-side
filelu.trashFooter: Restored files will reappear in their original folder
filelu.trashAutoExpiry: Trashed files are automatically deleted by FileLu after 7 days

introHub.noServersHint: Start with a quick connection or explore the service catalog.
introHub.discoverDescription: Browse 29+ integrated cloud services, S3-compatible storage, WebDAV providers, and more. Each service comes with pre-configured settings for a quick setup.
introHub.discoverHint: Click a service to set up a pre-configured connection with minimal input.
